label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes column 17 on the Locking object and receives SUCCESS. The cited LastReEncryptLBA evidence says this column reports re-encryption progress and SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so accepting the host modification is protocol-noncompliant.

label: FAIL
rationale: The target Set writes column 18 on the Locking object and receives SUCCESS. The cited LastReEncStat evidence says this column reports re-encryption status and SHALL NOT be modifiable by the host, so accepting the host modification is protocol-noncompliant.
